about.title: About Me
about.description1: I'm a student at Shenzhen University's School of Communication, with a passion for organization, leadership, and interpersonal communication. With experience in sales and team coordination, I excel at building meaningful connections and driving collaborative success.
about.description2: My journey has been shaped by a commitment to continuous growth, strong coordination abilities, and a genuine passion for bringing people together. I thrive in dynamic environments where collaboration and communication create lasting impact.

items.description: Gained comprehensive understanding of basic business operations and sales models. Developed strong client relationship management and negotiation skills.
Served as class monitor for several years, developing strong coordination and organizational skills. Managed class affairs and fostered team cohesion.
Member of the Organization Department in the School of Communication. Contributing to event planning and organizational initiatives.
Currently studying at the School of Communication. Member of the Organization Department in the School of Communication.
Graduated with top 5% ranking in the entire grade. Received District Outstanding Student Award and School Outstanding Student Award.

featured.title: Leadership & Organization
featured.description: Multi-year experience as class monitor with strong coordination and organizational abilities. Demonstrated excellence in team management, event coordination, and fostering collaborative environments. Currently contributing to organizational initiatives at Shenzhen University.

items.title: Sales Experience
items.description: Comprehensive understanding of business operations and sales models from international company.

items.title: Volunteer Work
items.description: Over 100 hours of volunteer service demonstrating commitment to community engagement.

items.title: Academic Excellence
items.description: Top 5% ranking in entire grade with multiple academic and leadership awards.

items.title: Communication Skills
items.description: Strong interpersonal communication and negotiation abilities developed through diverse experiences.

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.description: I'm always interested in connecting with like-minded individuals and exploring new opportunities for collaboration and growth.
